research_topic: Research C - Patient complaints, raw quotes, reviews, and experience data about health-system identification failures
finding: Dismissal can occur before diagnostic reasoning is complete.
what_happened: Doctor reportedly restricted history to yes/no answers.
what_was_identified: Patient narrative and context not captured.
what_was_missed: Patient narrative and context not captured.
cause_or_contributing_factor: Dismissal can occur before diagnostic reasoning is complete.
product_or_system_implication: Capture patient concern verbatim and flag interrupted histories.

what_was_missed: Pain medication and asthma concerns not addressed.

what_was_missed: Cause of severe symptoms not identified/explained.

research_topic: Research C - Patient complaints, raw quotes, reviews, and experience data about health-system identification failures

finding: Referral rejection can be confused with diagnostic exclusion.

what_was_missed: Patient felt ADHD effectively ruled out without assessment.

research_topic: Research C - Patient complaints, raw quotes, reviews, and experience data about health-system identification failures
finding: Discordant tests should not close diagnosis.

what_was_missed: Pulmonary embolism likely missed; PE blood test not done.
cause_or_contributing_factor: Discordant tests should not close diagnosis.
outcome_or_consequence: Patient died; PHSO found likely survival with right treatment.
